movie.title: A Future on Stage
movie.tagline: The Making of a Broadway Musical
movie.overview: A documentary on the making of the Broadway and West End musical stage adaptation of Back to the Future.

movie.title: Jaws @ 50: The Definitive Inside Story
movie.tagline: The movie you know. The story you don’t.
movie.overview: The authorized documentary celebrating the film that redefined Hollywood, 50 years after its premiere. Featuring rare archival footage and interviews with acclaimed Hollywood directors alongside Steven Spielberg, top shark scientists, and conservationists, the film uncovers the behind-the-scenes chaos and how the film launched the summer blockbuster, inspired a new wave of filmmakers, and paved the way for shark conservation that continues today.

movie.title: Tom Hanks: The Nomad
movie.overview: From humble beginnings to an aspiring thespian to acting as some of the world's most iconic and notable characters. He has picked up a reputation as 'America's Nice Guy', 'The Everyman' and a nomad of the arts. But we all know him... as Tom Hanks.

movie.title: Spielberg
movie.tagline: Direct from the heart
movie.overview: A documentary on the life and career of one of the most influential film directors of all time, Steven Spielberg.

movie.title: Back in Time
movie.tagline: A Back to the Future documentary
movie.overview: Cast, crew and fans explore the “Back to the Future” time-travel trilogy's resonance throughout our culture, thirty years after Marty McFly went back in time.

movie.title: Back To the Present: The Special
movie.overview: Robert Zemeckis's Back To The Future was a huge box-office hit in 1985 that ultimately led to two sequels. In 1989, in Back To The Future Part II, Michael J. Fox aka Marty Mc Fly and Christopher Lloyd aka DOC, travel into the future to October 21st 2015. At the time, the movie's crazy inventions seemed far from achievable but little did we know they would actually be so close to reality!
movie.original_title: Back to the Present: The Special

movie.title: Milius
movie.tagline: Man. Myth. Legend.
movie.overview: The life story of ‘Zen Anarchist’ filmmaker John Milius, one of the most influential storytellers of his generation.

movie.title: Persistence of Vision
movie.tagline: The untold story of the greatest animated film never made.
movie.overview: It was to be the greatest animated film of all time. Not just an eye-opener, but a game-changer. Richard Williams demanded nothing less, investing nearly three decades into his movie masterpiece. From as early as 1964 he ploughed most of the profits right back into his pet project, a feature inspired by the Arabian Nights and provisionally known as Mullah Nasruddin. He assembled a team of inspired young artists—and brought in the best Hollywood craftsmen to teach them—and devised what would be the most elaborate, kaleidoscopic, mind-boggling visual sequences ever committed to celluloid. Years passed. Potential financiers came and went. Work continued. But it was only after Roger Rabbit that Williams had a studio budget to corroborate the munificence of his imagination.

movie.title: Brian May's Brief History of 3D
movie.overview: A look into the history of 3D by Brian May from Queen.

movie.title: Tales from the Future
movie.overview: Eight-part retrospective documentary on the making of "Back to the Future" (and its two sequels) for the film's 25th anniversary.

movie.title: Waking Sleeping Beauty
movie.tagline: From 1984 to 1994 a perfect storm of people and circumstances changed the face of animation forever.
movie.overview: By the mid-1980s, the fabled animation studios of Walt Disney had fallen on hard times. The artists were polarized between newcomers hungry to innovate and old timers not yet ready to relinquish control. These conditions produced a series of box-office flops and pessimistic forecasts: maybe the best days of animation were over. Maybe the public didn't care. Only a miracle or a magic spell could produce a happy ending. Waking Sleeping Beauty is no fairy tale. It's the true story of how Disney regained its magic with a staggering output of hits - "Little Mermaid," "Beauty and the Beast ," "Aladdin," "The Lion King," and more - over a 10-year period.

movie.title: Looking Back to the Future
movie.overview: A 9-part retrospective documentary from 2009 on the trilogy’s legacy.

movie.title: The Cutting Edge: The Magic of Movie Editing
movie.tagline: SECRETS OF MOVIE MAGIC REVEALED — VIA THE CRAFT OF THE FILM EDITOR!
movie.overview: Documentary about the art of film editing. Clips are shown from many groundbreaking films with innovative editing styles.
movie.original_title: The Cutting Edge: The Magic of Movie Editing

movie.title: Behind the Ears: The True Story of Roger Rabbit
movie.overview: The complete documentary on the production of the movie "Who Framed Roger Rabbit".
movie.original_title: Behind the Ears: The True Story of Roger Rabbit

movie.title: Back to the Future: Making the Trilogy
movie.overview: This is the making of the Back to the Future Trilogy by acclaimed documentary maker Laurent Bouzereau and appears on the Back to the Future DVD set.
movie.original_title: Back to the Future: Making the Trilogy

movie.title: From Star Wars to Star Wars: The Story of Industrial Light & Magic
movie.overview: The incredible evolution of George Lucas' special effects dream factory, including an inside look at "Star Wars: Episode One - The Phantom Menace."
movie.original_title: From Star Wars to Star Wars: The Story of Industrial Light & Magic

movie.title: The Making of 'The Frighteners'
movie.overview: Documentary about the making of the 1996 horror-comedy.

movie.title: The Making of '1941'
movie.overview: A non-narrated documentary, told mainly in interviews with the filmmakers, on the making of the cult comedy classic, featuring outtakes, rare behind-the-scenes home movies, and trivia facts.

movie.title: Through the Eyes of Forrest Gump
movie.overview: A look behind the scenes of Robert Zemeckis' 1994 Oscar-winning film, 'Forrest Gump'.
movie.original_title: Through the Eyes of Forrest Gump

movie.title: The Secrets of the 'Back to the Future' Trilogy
movie.overview: The Secrets of the Back to the Future Trilogy was a program hosted by Kirk Cameron. The show answered questions that Back to the Future fans sent in by letter.  It was released onto videocassette in 1990 and as a bonus feature on the disc for Back to the Future Part III in the 2002 release of the Back to the Future trilogy. It is also available in the 2010 Blu-Ray trilogy.
movie.original_title: The Secrets of the 'Back to the Future' Trilogy

movie.title: Back to the Future (Part II): Behind-the-Scenes Special Presentation
movie.original_title: Back to the Future (Part II): Behind-the-Scenes Special Presentation

movie.title: First Works
movie.overview: It's a mixed bag in the age of illuminating DVD supplements, but First Works effectively demonstrates the early promise of 13 successful filmmakers. Culled from programs originally broadcast on Showtime in 1990, this crude compilation combines student films, early professional work, and interviews with now-famous directors at various stages of commercial and artistic achievement.

movie.title: Citizen Steve
movie.overview: On the occasion of the 40th birthday of the almighty filmmaker Steven Allan Spielberg, inquisitive reporter Clip Maxwell attempts to uncover the truth behind his undisputed rise to the throne of the Amblin Empire.

movie.title: The Making of Back to the Future
movie.overview: The Making of 'Back to the Future'
movie.original_title: The Making of Back to the Future

movie.title: Here
movie.tagline: Joy, hope, loss, love, life happens...
movie.overview: An odyssey through time and memory, centered on a place in New Jersey where—from wilderness, and then, later, from a home—love, loss, struggle, hope and legacy play out between couples and families over generations.

movie.title: Pinocchio
movie.tagline: The beloved classic comes to life.
movie.overview: A wooden puppet embarks on a thrilling adventure to become a real boy.

movie.title: Finch
movie.tagline: Take an unforgettable journey.
movie.overview: On a post-apocalyptic Earth, a robot, built to protect the life of his dying creator's beloved dog, learns about life, love, friendship, and what it means to be human.

movie.title: Roald Dahl's The Witches
movie.tagline: Witches are real!
movie.overview: In late 1967, a young orphaned boy goes to live with his loving grandma in the rural Alabama town of Demopolis. As the boy and his grandmother encounter some deceptively glamorous but thoroughly diabolical witches, she wisely whisks him away to a seaside resort. Regrettably, they arrive at precisely the same time that the world's Grand High Witch has gathered.

movie.title: Welcome to Marwen
movie.tagline: You can't put this hero in a box.
movie.overview: When a devastating attack shatters Mark Hogancamp and wipes away all memories, no one expected recovery. Putting together pieces from his old and new life, Mark meticulously creates a wondrous town named Marwen where he can heal and be heroic. As he builds an astonishing art installation — a testament to the most powerful women he knows — through his fantasy world, he draws strength to triumph in the real one.

movie.title: Elemental: Hydrogen vs. Hindenburg
movie.overview: "Elemental" is the groundbreaking television event from Academy Award-winning executive producer Robert Zemeckis that reveals how the elements of the periodic table have controlled the outcome of human history. This one-hour drama tells the harrowing story of the Hindenburg disaster. Sophisticated cinematography, animation and spectacular visual effects bring this fiery saga to life in a way no audience has seen before.

movie.title: Allied
movie.tagline: The enemy is listening.
movie.overview: In 1942, an intelligence officer in North Africa encounters a female French Resistance fighter on a deadly mission behind enemy lines. When they reunite in London, their relationship is tested by the pressures of war.

movie.title: The Walk
movie.tagline: Every dream begins with a single step
movie.overview: The story of French high-wire artist Philippe Petit's attempt to cross the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center in 1974.

movie.title: Flight
movie.tagline: Some miracles are not what they seem.
movie.overview: Commercial airline pilot Whip Whitaker has a problem with drugs and alcohol, though so far he's managed to complete his flights safely. His luck runs out when a disastrous mechanical malfunction sends his plane hurtling toward the ground. Whip pulls off a miraculous crash-landing that results in only six lives lost. Shaken to the core, Whip vows to get sober -- but when the crash investigation exposes his addiction, he finds himself in an even worse situation.

movie.title: Bound by Flesh
movie.overview: Conjoined twins Daisy and Violet Hilton were once the cream of the sideshow crop. Taught to sing and dance at an early age, the winsome duo ascended through the early 20th-century vaudeville circuit as a side attraction (working alongside Bob Hope and Charlie Chaplin as well as a memorable turn in the Tod Browning classic "Freaks") before a cascade of unscrupulous management and harsh mistreatment brought their careers (and lives) tumbling down. This engrossing glimpse into a bygone era is filled with fascinating interviews and rare archival footage.

movie.title: Real Steel
movie.tagline: Courage is stronger than steel.
movie.overview: Charlie Kenton is a washed-up fighter who retired from the ring when robots took over the sport. After his robot is trashed, he reluctantly teams up with his estranged son to rebuild and train an unlikely contender.

movie.title: Back For The Future
movie.overview: It was an ordinary evening at Lone Pine Mall. All Kevin Durant wanted was a new pair of shoes. Then the space-time continuum showed up.

movie.title: Mars Needs Moms
movie.tagline: Mom needs a little space.
movie.overview: When Martians suddenly abduct his mom, mischievous Milo rushes to the rescue and discovers why all moms are so special.

movie.title: Behind the Burly Q
movie.tagline: The Story of Burlesque in America.
movie.overview: Dive into more than a century of decadence with this tantalizing look at the evolution of burlesque. Cabaret star Leslie Zemeckis traces the art form from vaudeville-style variety show through its extinction and contemporary rebirth. Vintage photos, film clips and ads illustrate burlesque's resilient history and how the public's sexual appetite kept it alive amid moral and legal ado.

movie.title: A Christmas Carol
movie.tagline: It only takes one night to change your life.
movie.overview: Miser Ebenezer Scrooge is awakened on Christmas Eve by spirits who reveal to him his own miserable existence, what opportunities he wasted in his youth, his current cruelties, and the dire fate that awaits him if he does not change his ways. Scrooge is faced with his own story of growing bitterness and meanness, and must decide what his own future will hold: death or redemption.

movie.title: Beowulf
movie.tagline: Face your demons.
movie.overview: A 6th-century Scandinavian warrior named Beowulf embarks on a mission to slay the man-like ogre, Grendel.

movie.title: The Reaping
movie.tagline: Thousands of years ago, there was a series of bizarre occurrences that many believe to have been the Ten Biblical Plagues. No one thought they could happen again. Until now.
movie.overview: Katherine Morrissey, a former Christian missionary, lost her faith after the tragic deaths of her family. Now she applies her expertise to debunking religious phenomena. When a series of biblical plagues overrun a small town, Katherine arrives to prove that a supernatural force is not behind the occurrences, but soon finds that science cannot explain what is happening. Instead, she must regain her faith to combat the evil that waits in a Louisiana swamp.

movie.title: Monster House
movie.tagline: There goes the neighborhood.
movie.overview: Monsters under the bed are scary enough, but what happens when an entire house is out to get you? Three teens aim to find out when they go up against a decrepit neighboring home and unlock its frightening secrets.

movie.title: Last Holiday
movie.tagline: She always thought she was somebody special... and she was.
movie.overview: The discovery that she has a terminal illness prompts introverted department store saleswoman Georgia Byrd to reflect on what she realizes has been an overly cautious life. With weeks to live, she withdraws her life savings, sells all her possessions and jets off to Europe where she lives it up at a posh hotel. Upbeat and passionate, Georgia charms everybody she meets, including renowned Chef Didier. The only one missing from her new life is her longtime crush Sean Williams.

movie.title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio
movie.tagline: She raised ten kids on twenty five words or less.
movie.overview: A Midwestern housewife supports her large family by entering contests for ad slogans sponsored by consumer product companies, while dealing with abuse from her alcoholic husband. Based on a true story.
movie.original_title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio

movie.title: House of Wax
movie.tagline: Prey. Slay. Display.
movie.overview: A group of unwitting teens are stranded near a strange wax museum and soon must fight to survive and keep from becoming the next exhibit.

movie.title: The Polar Express
movie.tagline: A journey like you’ve never imagined.
movie.overview: When a doubting young boy takes an extraordinary train ride to the North Pole, he embarks on a journey of self-discovery that shows him that the wonder of life never fades for those who believe.

movie.title: Gothika
movie.tagline: Because someone is dead doesn't mean they're gone.
movie.overview: After a car crash, criminal psychologist Dr. Miranda Grey regains consciousness only to find that she's a patient in the same mental institution that currently employs her. She's been accused of murdering her husband Dr. Douglas Grey — but she has no memory of committing the crime. As she tries to regain her memory and convince her co-worker, Dr. Pete Graham, of her innocence, a vengeful spirit uses her as an earthly pawn, which further convinces everyone of her guilt.

movie.title: Matchstick Men
movie.tagline: Lie. Cheat. Steal. Rinse. Repeat.
movie.overview: A phobic con artist and his protege are on the verge of pulling off a lucrative swindle when the con artist's teenage daughter arrives unexpectedly.

movie.title: Ritual
movie.tagline: Older than Bones. Darker than Blood. Stronger than Science.
movie.overview: An American doctor encounters members of a voodoo cult when she is summoned to Jamaica to treat a wealthy man's brother.

movie.title: Ghost Ship
movie.tagline: Sea evil.
movie.overview: After discovering a passenger ship missing since 1962 floating adrift on the Bering Sea, salvagers claim the vessel as their own. Once they begin towing the ghost ship towards harbor, a series of bizarre occurrences happen and the group becomes trapped inside the ship, which they soon learn is inhabited by a demonic creature.

movie.title: Thir13en Ghosts
movie.tagline: Misery loves company.
movie.overview: Arthur and his two children inherit his uncle's estate: a glass house that serves as a prison to twelve ghosts. When the family, accompanied by a nanny and an attorney, enter the house they find themselves trapped inside an evil machine 'designed by the Devil and powered by the dead' to open the Eye of Hell. Aided by a ghost hunter and his rival, a ghost rights activist out to set the ghosts free, the group must do what they can to get out of the house alive.

movie.title: Cast Away
movie.tagline: At the edge of the world, his journey begins.
movie.overview: Chuck Noland, a top international manager for FedEx, and Kelly, a Ph.D. student, are in love and heading towards marriage. Then Chuck's plane to Malaysia crashes at sea during a terrible storm. He's the only survivor, and finds himself marooned on a desolate island. With no way to escape, Chuck must find ways to survive in his new home.

movie.title: What Lies Beneath
movie.tagline: He was the perfect husband until his one mistake followed them home.
movie.overview: Norman and Claire Spencer are a seemingly happily married couple who uncover a terrible secret… a secret so disturbing it threatens to destroy them.

movie.title: House on Haunted Hill
movie.tagline: Evil loves to party.
movie.overview: An amusement park mogul offers a random group of diverse people $1 million to spend the night in a decrepit former mental institution.

movie.title: Contact
movie.tagline: Take a journey to the heart of the universe.
movie.overview: A radio astronomer receives the first extraterrestrial radio signal ever picked up on Earth. As the world powers scramble to decipher the message and decide upon a course of action, she must make some difficult decisions between her beliefs, the truth, and reality.

movie.title: Bordello of Blood
movie.tagline: Evil bites!
movie.overview: Private eye Rafe Guttman is hired by repressed, born-again Katherine to find her missing bad-boy brother. The trail leads him to a whorehouse run by a thousand-year-old vampire and secretly backed by Katherine's boss, televangelist Jimmy Current.

movie.title: The Frighteners
movie.tagline: No rest for the wicked.
movie.overview: Once an architect, Frank Bannister now passes himself off as an exorcist of evil spirits. To bolster his facade, he claims his "special" gift is the result of a car accident that killed his wife. But what he does not count on is more people dying in the small town where he lives. As he tries to piece together the supernatural mystery of these killings, he falls in love with the wife of one of the victims and deals with a crazy FBI agent.

movie.title: W.E.I.R.D. World
movie.overview: Greed, murder, sex - all appear to thrive at the Wilson Emery Institute for Research and Development, aka W.E.I.R.D., where brilliant, young, but emotionally unstable scientific geniuses are recruited to develop cutting-edge projects in such fields as virology, time-travel, rejuvenation and robotics.

movie.title: Tales from the Crypt: Demon Knight
movie.tagline: Ready for your deadtime story?
movie.overview: Ex-soldier Frank Brayker is the guardian of an ancient key that can unlock tremendous evil; the sinister Collector is a demon who wants the key so he can initiate the apocalypse. On the run from wicked mercenaries for almost 90 years, Brayker finally stops in at a boarding house in New Mexico where — with the help of its residents — he plans to face off against the Collector and his band of ghouls, preventing them from ever seizing the key.
movie.original_title: Tales from the Crypt: Demon Knight

movie.title: Tales From The Crypt: Doctor of Horror
movie.overview: Charlie and Richard are two loser security guards who work the night shift in a local morgue. There first night on the job becomes an eventful one when they catch the eccentric Dr. Orloff trying to pilfer one of the corpses kept in storage. It's not long before the crazed physician appeals to their greed in including them in his twisted scientific plot.
movie.original_title: Tales From The Crypt: Doctor of Horror

movie.title: Tales From The Crypt: Well Cooked Hams
movie.overview: In a desperate attempt to spice up his act, a hack turn-of-the-century magician (Billy Zane) kills a rival magician (Martin Sheen) and steals his famed prop, the Box of Death.
movie.original_title: Tales From The Crypt: Well Cooked Hams

movie.title: Tales From The Crypt: People Who Live in Brass Hearses
movie.overview: A hot-tempered convict with a butter addiction (Bill Paxton) tries to get revenge, with the help of his mentally challenged brother, (Brad Dourif) on the ice cream trucker who was responsible for his arrest, unaware the driver (Michael Lerner) also has a dark secret too.
movie.original_title: Tales From The Crypt: People Who Live in Brass Hearses

movie.title: Tales From The Crypt: Food for Thought
movie.overview: A psychic clown and part-time cook (Ernie Hudson) who abuses his assistant and wife (Joan Chen) learns that she is having an affair with a fire eater (John Laughlin) and plans to runs off with him.
movie.original_title: Tales From The Crypt: Food for Thought

movie.title: Tales From The Crypt: As Ye Sow
movie.overview: Wealthy and successful middle-aged businessman Leo Burns (Hector Elizondo) suspects that his much younger wife Bridget (Patsy Kensit) is having an extramarital affair. Leo hires sleazy private investigator G.G. Devoe (Sam Waterston) to find out the identity of Bridget's lover.
movie.original_title: Tales From The Crypt: As Ye Sow

movie.title: Tales From The Crypt: Death of Some Salesmen
movie.overview: A conniving con-man (Ed Begley Jr.) posing as a salesman gets more than he bargained for when he comes knocks at the door of the wrong family.
movie.original_title: Tales From The Crypt: Death of Some Salesmen

movie.title: Trespass
movie.tagline: They all came to the wrong place at the wrong time.
movie.overview: Two Arkansas firemen, Vince and Don, get hold of a map that leads to a cache of stolen gold in an abandoned factory in East St. Louis. What they don't know is that the factory is on the turf of a local gang, who come by to execute one of their enemies. Vince sees the shooting, the gang spots Vince, and extended mayhem ensues. As Vince and Don try to escape, gang leader King James argues with his subordinate Savon about how to get rid of the trespassers.

movie.title: The Public Eye
movie.tagline: Murder. Scandal. Crime. No matter what he was shooting, "The Great Bernzini" never took sides, he only took pictures... Except once.
movie.overview: A crime photographer gets involved in a conspiracy.

movie.title: Death Becomes Her
movie.tagline: In one small bottle... The fountain of youth. The secret of eternal life. The power of an ancient potion. Sometimes it works... sometimes it doesn't.
movie.overview: Madeline is married to Ernest, who was once her arch-rival Helen's fiancé. After recovering from a mental breakdown, Helen vows to kill Madeline and steal back Ernest. Unfortunately for everyone, the introduction of a magic potion causes things to be a great deal more complicated than a mere murder plot.

movie.title: Two-Fisted Tales
movie.overview: The foul-mouthed, wheelchair-bound Mr. Rush introduces three adventure tales inspired by the EC Comics of the 1950s: "Showdown," "King of the Road," and "Yellow."  This star-studded telefilm was an attempt to launch a second anthology series in the mold of "Tales from the Crypt."  When the film failed to generate sufficient interest, the three tales were re-edited and shown as "Crypt" episodes.

movie.title: School for Scumbags
movie.overview: An often-expelled student finds a home at the Gafin School for "misdirected" teens -- an institution run by professional thieves.

movie.title: Ares
movie.overview: An astronaut whose space capsule crash lands in an African desert. As he rushes to reunite with his family, it is revealed that the mission was part of a larger conspiracy and that he may be carrying a secret that could forever change the world.

movie.title: Tales From The Crypt: Creep Course
movie.overview: A bookworm (Nina Siemaszko) is tricked by a jock (Anthony Michael Hall) and their evil Egyptologist professor (Jeffrey Jones) into becoming a virgin sacrifice for a long preserved mummy.
movie.original_title: Tales From The Crypt: Creep Course

movie.title: Barracuda
movie.overview: When Karl, a former smuggler with a haunted past, storms a nightclub in Mexico to rescue Jodie, a kidnapped teenage girl, he ignites a chain reaction of blood and bullets that burns across 100 miles of deadly roads toward the U.S. border. The breakout turns into a high-speed race when Karl kills the brother of the ruthless club owner and steals his prized 1973 Plymouth Barracuda. Now hunted by relentless criminals, Karl and Jodie tear across the desert with no way to slow down.

movie.title: Here
movie.tagline: Joy, hope, loss, love, life happens...
movie.overview: An odyssey through time and memory, centered on a place in New Jersey where—from wilderness, and then, later, from a home—love, loss, struggle, hope and legacy play out between couples and families over generations.

movie.title: Pinocchio
movie.tagline: The beloved classic comes to life.
movie.overview: A wooden puppet embarks on a thrilling adventure to become a real boy.

movie.title: Roald Dahl's The Witches
movie.tagline: Witches are real!
movie.overview: In late 1967, a young orphaned boy goes to live with his loving grandma in the rural Alabama town of Demopolis. As the boy and his grandmother encounter some deceptively glamorous but thoroughly diabolical witches, she wisely whisks him away to a seaside resort. Regrettably, they arrive at precisely the same time that the world's Grand High Witch has gathered.

movie.title: Welcome to Marwen
movie.tagline: You can't put this hero in a box.
movie.overview: When a devastating attack shatters Mark Hogancamp and wipes away all memories, no one expected recovery. Putting together pieces from his old and new life, Mark meticulously creates a wondrous town named Marwen where he can heal and be heroic. As he builds an astonishing art installation — a testament to the most powerful women he knows — through his fantasy world, he draws strength to triumph in the real one.

movie.title: Doc Brown Saves the World
movie.overview: In order to save the world from a nuclear holocaust in 2045, Doc Brown must push the technological age back at least 50 years preventing Mattel Hoverboards and Mr. Fusion from being created.

movie.title: The Walk
movie.tagline: Every dream begins with a single step
movie.overview: The story of French high-wire artist Philippe Petit's attempt to cross the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center in 1974.

movie.title: A Christmas Carol
movie.tagline: It only takes one night to change your life.
movie.overview: Miser Ebenezer Scrooge is awakened on Christmas Eve by spirits who reveal to him his own miserable existence, what opportunities he wasted in his youth, his current cruelties, and the dire fate that awaits him if he does not change his ways. Scrooge is faced with his own story of growing bitterness and meanness, and must decide what his own future will hold: death or redemption.

movie.title: Beowulf
movie.tagline: Face your demons.
movie.overview: A 6th-century Scandinavian warrior named Beowulf embarks on a mission to slay the man-like ogre, Grendel.

movie.title: The Polar Express
movie.tagline: A journey like you’ve never imagined.
movie.overview: When a doubting young boy takes an extraordinary train ride to the North Pole, he embarks on a journey of self-discovery that shows him that the wonder of life never fades for those who believe.

movie.title: Bordello of Blood
movie.tagline: Evil bites!
movie.overview: Private eye Rafe Guttman is hired by repressed, born-again Katherine to find her missing bad-boy brother. The trail leads him to a whorehouse run by a thousand-year-old vampire and secretly backed by Katherine's boss, televangelist Jimmy Current.

movie.title: Trespass
movie.tagline: They all came to the wrong place at the wrong time.
movie.overview: Two Arkansas firemen, Vince and Don, get hold of a map that leads to a cache of stolen gold in an abandoned factory in East St. Louis. What they don't know is that the factory is on the turf of a local gang, who come by to execute one of their enemies. Vince sees the shooting, the gang spots Vince, and extended mayhem ensues. As Vince and Don try to escape, gang leader King James argues with his subordinate Savon about how to get rid of the trespassers.

movie.title: Back to the Future... The Ride
movie.tagline: It's a Blast from the Past, Present and Future!
movie.overview: Sitting in a flying DeLorean, the audience gets rocked when traveling through several times.
movie.original_title: Back to the Future... The Ride

movie.title: Back to the Future Part III
movie.tagline: They've saved the best trip for last... But this time they may have gone too far.
movie.overview: The final installment finds Marty digging the trusty DeLorean out of a mineshaft and looking for Doc in the Wild West of 1885. But when their time machine breaks down, the travelers are stranded in a land of spurs. More problems arise when Doc falls for pretty schoolteacher Clara Clayton, and Marty tangles with Buford Tannen.
movie.original_title: Back to the Future Part III

movie.title: Back to the Future Part II
movie.tagline: Getting back was only the beginning.
movie.overview: Marty and Doc are at it again as the time-traveling duo head to 2015 to nip some McFly family woes in the bud. But things go awry thanks to bully Biff Tannen and a pesky sports almanac. In a last-ditch attempt to set things straight, Marty finds himself bound for 1955 and face to face with his teenage parents -- again.
movie.original_title: Back to the Future Part II

movie.title: Back to the Future
movie.tagline: He was never in time for his classes... He wasn't in time for his dinner... Then one day... he wasn't in his time at all.
movie.overview: Eighties teenager Marty McFly is accidentally sent back in time to 1955, inadvertently disrupting his parents' first meeting and attracting his mother's romantic interest. Marty must repair the damage to history by rekindling his parents' romance and - with the help of his eccentric inventor friend Doc Brown - return to 1985.

movie.title: Used Cars
movie.tagline: Like new, great looking and fully loaded with laughs.
movie.overview: When the owner of a struggling used car lot is killed, it's up to the lot's hot-shot salesman to save the property from falling into the hands of the owner's ruthless brother and used-car rival.

movie.tagline: Paranoia meets pandemonium.
movie.overview: In the days after the attack on Pearl Harbor, panic grips California, where a military officer leads a mob chasing a Japanese sub.

movie.title: I Wanna Hold Your Hand
movie.tagline: Some girls will do anything to meet their idols.
movie.overview: If they miss The Beatles' first appearance in the U.S.A., they will hate themselves for the rest of their lives - so four young girls from New Jersey set off even though they don't have tickets for the show! The journey is full of surprises and misfortunes but the young ladies are determined to reach their idols.

movie.title: A Field of Honor
movie.overview: An ex-soldier encounters many dangers in the small town he lives in.

movie.title: Here
movie.tagline: Joy, hope, loss, love, life happens...
movie.overview: An odyssey through time and memory, centered on a place in New Jersey where—from wilderness, and then, later, from a home—love, loss, struggle, hope and legacy play out between couples and families over generations.

movie.title: Pinocchio
movie.tagline: The beloved classic comes to life.
movie.overview: A wooden puppet embarks on a thrilling adventure to become a real boy.

movie.title: Roald Dahl's The Witches
movie.tagline: Witches are real!
movie.overview: In late 1967, a young orphaned boy goes to live with his loving grandma in the rural Alabama town of Demopolis. As the boy and his grandmother encounter some deceptively glamorous but thoroughly diabolical witches, she wisely whisks him away to a seaside resort. Regrettably, they arrive at precisely the same time that the world's Grand High Witch has gathered.

movie.title: Welcome to Marwen
movie.tagline: You can't put this hero in a box.
movie.overview: When a devastating attack shatters Mark Hogancamp and wipes away all memories, no one expected recovery. Putting together pieces from his old and new life, Mark meticulously creates a wondrous town named Marwen where he can heal and be heroic. As he builds an astonishing art installation — a testament to the most powerful women he knows — through his fantasy world, he draws strength to triumph in the real one.

movie.title: Allied
movie.tagline: The enemy is listening.
movie.overview: In 1942, an intelligence officer in North Africa encounters a female French Resistance fighter on a deadly mission behind enemy lines. When they reunite in London, their relationship is tested by the pressures of war.

movie.title: Doc Brown Saves the World
movie.overview: In order to save the world from a nuclear holocaust in 2045, Doc Brown must push the technological age back at least 50 years preventing Mattel Hoverboards and Mr. Fusion from being created.

movie.title: The Walk
movie.tagline: Every dream begins with a single step
movie.overview: The story of French high-wire artist Philippe Petit's attempt to cross the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center in 1974.

movie.title: Flight
movie.tagline: Some miracles are not what they seem.
movie.overview: Commercial airline pilot Whip Whitaker has a problem with drugs and alcohol, though so far he's managed to complete his flights safely. His luck runs out when a disastrous mechanical malfunction sends his plane hurtling toward the ground. Whip pulls off a miraculous crash-landing that results in only six lives lost. Shaken to the core, Whip vows to get sober -- but when the crash investigation exposes his addiction, he finds himself in an even worse situation.

movie.title: A Christmas Carol
movie.tagline: It only takes one night to change your life.
movie.overview: Miser Ebenezer Scrooge is awakened on Christmas Eve by spirits who reveal to him his own miserable existence, what opportunities he wasted in his youth, his current cruelties, and the dire fate that awaits him if he does not change his ways. Scrooge is faced with his own story of growing bitterness and meanness, and must decide what his own future will hold: death or redemption.

movie.title: Beowulf
movie.tagline: Face your demons.
movie.overview: A 6th-century Scandinavian warrior named Beowulf embarks on a mission to slay the man-like ogre, Grendel.

movie.title: The Polar Express
movie.tagline: A journey like you’ve never imagined.
movie.overview: When a doubting young boy takes an extraordinary train ride to the North Pole, he embarks on a journey of self-discovery that shows him that the wonder of life never fades for those who believe.

movie.title: Cast Away
movie.tagline: At the edge of the world, his journey begins.
movie.overview: Chuck Noland, a top international manager for FedEx, and Kelly, a Ph.D. student, are in love and heading towards marriage. Then Chuck's plane to Malaysia crashes at sea during a terrible storm. He's the only survivor, and finds himself marooned on a desolate island. With no way to escape, Chuck must find ways to survive in his new home.

movie.title: What Lies Beneath
movie.tagline: He was the perfect husband until his one mistake followed them home.
movie.overview: Norman and Claire Spencer are a seemingly happily married couple who uncover a terrible secret… a secret so disturbing it threatens to destroy them.

movie.title: The Pursuit of Happiness
movie.overview: Showtime's "In the 20th Century" is a millennium-related strand of feature-length documentaries in which famous directors take on major subjects of their choosing. In the fourth of the six films, "The Pursuit of Happiness," filmmaker Robert Zemeckis delves into the history of America's relationship with mind-altering substances over the past 100 years, presenting interviews with historians and professionals in the drug treatment field, interspersed with a treasure trove of film and television clips depicting the highs and lows of smoking, drinking and drugging in the 20th century.

movie.title: Contact
movie.tagline: Take a journey to the heart of the universe.
movie.overview: A radio astronomer receives the first extraterrestrial radio signal ever picked up on Earth. As the world powers scramble to decipher the message and decide upon a course of action, she must make some difficult decisions between her beliefs, the truth, and reality.

movie.title: Forrest Gump
movie.tagline: The world will never be the same once you've seen it through the eyes of Forrest Gump.
movie.overview: A man with a low IQ has accomplished great things in his life and been present during significant historic events—in each case, far exceeding what anyone imagined he could do. But despite all he has achieved, his one true love eludes him.

movie.title: Death Becomes Her
movie.tagline: In one small bottle... The fountain of youth. The secret of eternal life. The power of an ancient potion. Sometimes it works... sometimes it doesn't.
movie.overview: Madeline is married to Ernest, who was once her arch-rival Helen's fiancé. After recovering from a mental breakdown, Helen vows to kill Madeline and steal back Ernest. Unfortunately for everyone, the introduction of a magic potion causes things to be a great deal more complicated than a mere murder plot.

movie.title: Two-Fisted Tales
movie.overview: The foul-mouthed, wheelchair-bound Mr. Rush introduces three adventure tales inspired by the EC Comics of the 1950s: "Showdown," "King of the Road," and "Yellow."  This star-studded telefilm was an attempt to launch a second anthology series in the mold of "Tales from the Crypt."  When the film failed to generate sufficient interest, the three tales were re-edited and shown as "Crypt" episodes.

movie.title: Back to the Future Part III
movie.tagline: They've saved the best trip for last... But this time they may have gone too far.
movie.overview: The final installment finds Marty digging the trusty DeLorean out of a mineshaft and looking for Doc in the Wild West of 1885. But when their time machine breaks down, the travelers are stranded in a land of spurs. More problems arise when Doc falls for pretty schoolteacher Clara Clayton, and Marty tangles with Buford Tannen.
movie.original_title: Back to the Future Part III

movie.title: Back to the Future Part II
movie.tagline: Getting back was only the beginning.
movie.overview: Marty and Doc are at it again as the time-traveling duo head to 2015 to nip some McFly family woes in the bud. But things go awry thanks to bully Biff Tannen and a pesky sports almanac. In a last-ditch attempt to set things straight, Marty finds himself bound for 1955 and face to face with his teenage parents -- again.
movie.original_title: Back to the Future Part II

movie.title: Who Framed Roger Rabbit
movie.tagline: It's the story of a man, a woman, and a rabbit in a triangle of trouble.
movie.overview: 'Toon star Roger is worried that his wife Jessica is playing pattycake with someone else, so the studio hires detective Eddie Valiant to snoop on her. But the stakes are quickly raised when Marvin Acme is found dead and Roger is the prime suspect.

movie.title: Amazing Stories
movie.tagline: As one experience ends... another adventure begins.
movie.overview: A feature film edited from three episodes of Amazing Stories (1985): The Mission, Mummy Daddy, and Go to the Head of the Class.

movie.title: Back to the Future
movie.tagline: He was never in time for his classes... He wasn't in time for his dinner... Then one day... he wasn't in his time at all.
movie.overview: Eighties teenager Marty McFly is accidentally sent back in time to 1955, inadvertently disrupting his parents' first meeting and attracting his mother's romantic interest. Marty must repair the damage to history by rekindling his parents' romance and - with the help of his eccentric inventor friend Doc Brown - return to 1985.

movie.title: Romancing the Stone
movie.tagline: She's a girl from the big city. He's a reckless soldier of fortune. For a fabulous treasure, they share an adventure no one could imagine... or survive.
movie.overview: Though she can spin wild tales of passionate romance, novelist Joan Wilder has no life of her own. Then one day adventure comes her way in the form of a mysterious package. It turns out that the parcel is the ransom she'll need to free her abducted sister, so Joan flies to South America to hand it over. But she gets on the wrong bus and winds up hopelessly stranded in the jungle.

movie.title: Used Cars
movie.tagline: Like new, great looking and fully loaded with laughs.
movie.overview: When the owner of a struggling used car lot is killed, it's up to the lot's hot-shot salesman to save the property from falling into the hands of the owner's ruthless brother and used-car rival.

movie.title: I Wanna Hold Your Hand
movie.tagline: Some girls will do anything to meet their idols.
movie.overview: If they miss The Beatles' first appearance in the U.S.A., they will hate themselves for the rest of their lives - so four young girls from New Jersey set off even though they don't have tickets for the show! The journey is full of surprises and misfortunes but the young ladies are determined to reach their idols.

movie.title: A Field of Honor
movie.overview: An ex-soldier encounters many dangers in the small town he lives in.

movie.title: The Lift
movie.overview: A businessman lives out his daily routine until he meets unexpected stress in the form of his apartment building's elevator.

movie.title: The Last Mrs. Parrish
movie.overview: A con artist targets a wealthy couple — the Parrishes — as her next victims. She infiltrates the pair by befriending the wife and seducing the husband, with the master plan of becoming the next Mrs. Parrish, only to discover that the wife’s life is far more complicated than she could have imagined.

movie.title: I'm Thinking of Ending Things
movie.tagline: It stays, it sticks, it lingers.
movie.overview: Nothing is as it seems when a woman experiencing misgivings about her new boyfriend joins him on a road trip to meet his parents at their remote farm.

movie.title: Project 88: Back to the Future Too
movie.tagline: 88 teams. 1 week. The future or bust.
movie.overview: More than 300 fans from 9 different countries joined together to remake Back to the Future Part II during the COVID-19 quarantine. The film was split into 88 scenes with 88 teams producing their segment using available resources all while obeying local social distancing guidelines. The result is an absurdly fun, wild ride that sees everything from pro-level live action to killer animation to... bananas and potatoes used to bring Back to the Future Part II to life all over again.
movie.original_title: Project 88: Back to the Future Too

movie.title: Plaga zombie: zona mutante: revolución tóxica
movie.tagline: ¡Aliens go home!
movie.overview: An invasion alien threatens the fate of humanity and begins in a village where there are Bill Johnson, John West and Max Giggs. The friends escape from there with the purpose of finding and destroying the invading ship before it completes its evil plan of conquest.
movie.original_title: Plaga zombie: zona mutante: revolución tóxica

movie.title: Looking Back to the Future
movie.overview: A 9-part retrospective documentary from 2009 on the trilogy’s legacy.

movie.title: DeGenerazione
movie.tagline: 10 Monsters for 10 Directors
movie.overview: Horror/sci-fi anthology with a punk streak, co-directed by and starring — among other newcomers — Asia Argento.

movie.title: Back to the Future (Part II): Behind-the-Scenes Special Presentation
movie.original_title: Back to the Future (Part II): Behind-the-Scenes Special Presentation
